task:
In Brave, open and bookmark each of these three Wikipedia pages, each in its own tab:
1. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Python_(programming_language)
2. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/JavaScript
3. https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rust_(programming_language)

Then close the JavaScript tab so exactly two tabs remain open: the Python and Rust pages. All three bookmarks (Python, JavaScript, Rust) must still exist.

verification.description: Tab with Python_(programming_language) Wikipedia page is open
Tab with Rust_(programming_language) Wikipedia page is open
Bookmark for JavaScript exists even though tab was closed
